summary: Phase 1: 23/23 pytest backend tests passed. Phase 2: End-to-end Playwright UI testing for both Pelamar and HR flows. Discovered & fixed a critical CandidateDetailDialog crash, then re-verified HR flows (stage change, SAW scores save, schedule tab, chat).

ui_bugs.issue: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'applicant_name'). Bug was triggered on FIRST open of any candidate row: state `latestApp` initialized as `useState(app)` with app=null, so first render after parent passes a non-null app prop used `a = latestApp` (still null) before useEffect runs. Fix applied: `const a = latestApp || app;`
React a11y warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent. Cosmetic / a11y only.

action_items: Add DialogDescription to DialogContent components (HRDashboard candidate dialog, Pelamar apply dialog) for a11y warning cleanup.
Consider initializing latestApp lazily or with useEffect-derived value to avoid similar future regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: HRDashboard.jsx is 792 lines — consider splitting CandidateDetailDialog, RankingView, PositionsView into separate files (>700 LOC guideline).
server.py is 785 lines — borderline; OK for now but routes could be split per resource (positions/applications/saw/...).
ApplyDialog has both internal+controlled open state — works but a bit unusual; document for maintainers.
saw_ranking recomputes & writes saw_score on every GET (side-effect on a read endpoint). Could move to an explicit POST /api/saw/recompute and GET being pure-read.
JWT cookie is set with secure=False; acceptable for preview, but in production must be True.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after fix (Pelamar login, dashboard, timeline, chat send, notification bell present, apply dialog open; HR login, sidebar nav x4, candidate detail dialog open, stage change toast, SAW scores save toast, schedule tab present, chat send, SAW recompute button works)

test_credentials: HR hr@pertacareer.id/hr123456 ; Pelamar pelamar@pertacareer.id/pelamar123 — both valid.
seed_data_creation: Seed creates 1 HR, 2 pelamar, 3 positions, 4 applications (idempotent). Verified via /api/stats and /api/applications endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints stable. The Pelamar demo user already has applications on all 3 seeded positions, so 'duplicate position application' branch is exercised; if you need to test fresh-apply UI flow, register a new pelamar via /auth/register or seed another empty position. The fixed null-safety bug was the only blocker for the HR candidate detail flow.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA: useState(app) captures the prop value at first mount only; subsequent prop changes do not re-initialize state, and the conditional render guard checks `app` not `latestApp`, so when parent transitions selectedApp null -> populated, the very first render reads `latestApp = null` and accesses .applicant_name causing TypeError. Reproduction: login as HR, click 'Kelola' on any candidate row. Mitigation: fallback to prop with `const a = latestApp || app;` (already applied).
